_comment: 接收系第1条·年度版(排播表#2)。主题图/词图/动效逐集逐词定制，本集设计如下。

hook.vi: Chúc bạn năm nay nhận đủ những điều này.
hook.pinyin: yuàn nǐ jīn nián shōu xià zhè yī qiè
hook.themePrompt: a warm round-faced young adult opens both hands as six distinct blessings float toward them: a four-leaf clover, a red prosperity pouch, a heart tied with red thread, a helping hand, a green leaf with heartbeat line, and a small victory trophy

words.imagePrompt: a smiling young woman catches a falling four-leaf clover beneath a small arc of lucky stars, with a few curved chalk motion marks
a cheerful shopkeeper ties a plump red prosperity pouch while a small money tree sprouts behind it, with a few festive red ribbons and gold sparkles; no chest and no pile of coins
two round friendly adults face one another and each holds one end of a vivid red thread that forms a single heart between their hands, with a few small pink petals
a kind gray-haired mentor extends a steady helping hand to a young adult climbing one difficult step, while a narrow warm doorway glows behind them
a rosy-cheeked middle-aged woman jogs lightly while a heartbeat-shaped chalk line, fresh green leaves and a small sun emblem orbit close around her
a determined young adult reaches the top of three hand-drawn steps and raises a modest golden trophy, surrounded by a compact halo of stars, paper confetti and upward chalk lines
